head: LXY0925lxy:fix/sparse-readme-files
title: fix: enhance sparse README files with proper structure
body:
Enhance several README files that had minimal or poorly formatted content:

1. robot_arm_grasping/README.md: Expanded from 2 lines to complete document with environment requirements, installation, quick start, and references
2. driving_violation_detection/README.md: Fixed formatting from bare numbered list to proper markdown structure
3. robotic_arm_gripping/README.md: Fixed incorrect H1 heading levels (converted internal H1s to proper H2/H3 levels)
